scripts.bootstrap: sh -c 'cd ../.. && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 MIX_BUILD_PATH=_build/test-e2e mix assets.setup && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 MIX_BUILD_PATH=_build/test-e2e mix assets.build && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 MIX_BUILD_PATH=_build/test-e2e mix ecto.create --quiet && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 MIX_BUILD_PATH=_build/test-e2e mix ecto.migrate --quiet && PORT=4002 MIX_ENV=test E2E=1 MIX_BUILD_PATH=_build/test-e2e mix run test/support/e2e/bootstrap.exs'
scripts.test:journeys: npm run bootstrap && playwright test specs/
